description: Configure isolated DSL branch state and verify automated reasoning tools

description: Maintain DSL canonical model validation provenance and status

description: Run the isolated DSL branch with canonical assertions ontology ASM and delta validation

description: Run checkpoint verification over the DSL baseline deltas rechecks and readiness
